creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
The current conclusion seems to be that it needs to be fixed in p5-DBD-mysql. OpenBSD uses the following patch, not sure if we want to include it. That's up to perl@

https://cvsweb.openbsd.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb/ports/databases/p5-DBD-mysql/patches/patch-dbdimp_c?rev=1.4&content-type=text/x-cvsweb-markup

More info:
https://github.com/perl5-dbi/DBD-mysql/issues/78
